chain.thought: Explanation: In the Open Cup column, they did not qualify in 1999, 2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, and 2013. That totals 14 times.

judge_thought: Explanation: From the Open Cup column, "did not qualify" appears in the following years: 1999, 2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2008, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013. That is 14 occurrences. Years 1998 and 2007 show "1st round" and are not counted.
